name: Billing System Corporation
summary: Billing System Corporation provides settlement services in Japan. Its services include direct debit, payment slip settlement, convenience store settlement, real-time payment confirmation, settlement services, branch sales centralized services, smartphone multi-payment services, smartphone settlement, tablet payments, multi-money payment solution for vending machines, money transfer support, finance and billing agency, and payment services for utilities. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Tokyo, Japan.
